description: Seed one-way sensitivity ranges for selected Vestibular-GenBN likelihood parameters. The current implementation varies p1 = P(finding=true | disease=true) while holding p0 = P(finding=true | disease=false) fixed at the seed value.

parameters.rationale: Typical positional history supports BPPV but is not canal-specific; a moderate range is used to reflect uncertainty in history-only diagnostic information.
Moderate posterior-canal BPPV phenotype support is a canal-specific bedside pattern, but the seed value should remain editable and sensitivity-tested.
Strong horizontal-canal BPPV roll-test phenotype support is highly disease-compatible; a conservative high-range sensitivity check is provided.
Audiometric low- to mid-frequency sensorineural hearing loss is a key supportive phenotype for definite-like Meniere disease in the demonstration bundle.
Caloric-vHIT dissociation is modeled as supportive follow-up evidence; a broader range reflects setting- and protocol-dependent variability.
The retrocochlear/CPA-IAC pattern is used as direct posterior support plus an action overlay; sensitivity analysis should test uncertainty in this seed likelihood.
